arts.ttl: Aston Villa closing on sensational Marcus Rashford loan deal
arts.sum: Aston Villa look likely to end Marcus Rashford's Manchester United hell by agreeing a loan deal until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Arsenal get new Ollie Watkins hope as Aston Villa deal ‘CLOSE’
arts.sum: Arsenal ’s hopes of signing Aston Villa striker Ollie Watkins have had new life breathed into them. Arsenal get new Ollie Watkins hope as Aston Villa deal ‘CLOSE’

arts.ttl: Watkins has told me he wants to stay at Villa - Emery
arts.sum: Striker Ollie Watkins tells boss Unai Emery he wants to stay at Aston Villa and reject interest from Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Duran completes £71m Saudi move from Aston Villa
arts.sum: Striker Jhon Duran joins Saudi Pro League side Al-Nassr from Aston Villa in a deal worth up to £71m.

arts.ttl: Player is ‘getting closer’ to Aston Villa – ‘Common ground’ found for transfer negotiations
arts.sum: Aston Villa are continuing negotiations with Paris Saint Germain for Marco Asensio and hope to secure him on loan. That’s according to Foot Mercato, who report that the 29-year-old Spaniard is ‘getting closer’ to joining Aston Villa. They report that PSG are currently locked in negotiations over two exits, Cher Ndour and Asensio. Ndour is The post Player is ‘getting closer’ to Aston Villa – ‘Common ground’ found for transfer negotiations appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Major Marcus Rashford to Aston Villa transfer update as buy option discussed
arts.sum: The fact that Villa can offer Rashford Champions League football is a big plus for the player, while Emery’s side are also still in contention of finishing in the top five this term, which would likely secure Champions League football next season too. Villa are pushing to sign Rashford after selling Jhon Duran to Al-Nassr for £65m plus add-ons.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa closing in on Rashford loan deal
arts.sum: Aston Villa are closing in on a loan deal for Manchester United striker Marcus Rashford.

arts.ttl: New name added to Aston Villa attacking transfer shortlist – Monchi ‘convinced’ by him
arts.sum: Nice striker Evann Guessand is on Aston Villa’s shortlist as they look to bolster their attack before the end of the transfer window. That’s according to L’Equipe, who report that Guessand is on the list alongside Joao Felix and Marcus Rashford. arts.ttl: Sources: Rashford nears Utd exit with Villa loan
arts.sum: Aston Villa are close to agreeing a loan deal for Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford, sources have told ESPN.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford 'close' to joining Aston Villa in MEGA deal
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford 'close' to joining Aston Villa in MEGA deal In encouraging news for the winger, Aston Villa boss Unai Emery “personally requested” that the Villans chase the attacker.
